# 279: Applied Data Science {#applieddatascience .unnumbered}

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
source("scheduler.R")
knitr::opts_chunk$set(cache = FALSE, dev = "pdf")
first_day <- as.Date("2026-01-13")
cache <- F
number_of_classes <- 29
number_of_weeks <- 7
assignments_week <- 7
A_contract <- 7
B_contract <- 6
Pass_contract <- 5

A_contract_lab <-A_contract
A_contract_port <- A_contract-1

B_contract_lab <-B_contract
B_contract_port <- B_contract-1
Pass_contract_lab <-Pass_contract
Pass_contract_port <- Pass_contract-1

Midterm_checkin_min <- 3
Midterm_checkin_max <- 4
####
# devtools::install_github("crsh/citr")
library(tidyverse)
library(citr)
library(RefManageR)
```


```{r child = './common/content/0204_datascience.Xmd'}
```
